results.description: THE UNITED STATES ARMY CORPS OF ENGINEERS, VICKSBURG DISTRICT, REVETMENT BRANCH HAS A REQUIREMENT FOR THE DRY DOCKING OF THE M/V BENYAURD TO PERFORM MAINTENANCE ON THE VESSEL IN PREPARATION OF THE 2025 REVETMENT SEASON.

THE UNITED STATES ARMY CORPS OF ENGINEERS, VICKSBURG DISTRICT, REVETMENT BRANCH, HAS A REQUIREMENT FOR THE DRY DOCKING OF THE M/V BENYAURD TO PERFORM MAINTENANCE ON THE VESSEL IN PREPARATION OF THE 2025 REVETMENT SEASON.
